rationale: In the citing paper, Fang, Palmatier, and Grewal (2011) is cited only in grouped literature citations to support broad background claims (e.g., that firm value and risk are relevant outcomes and that innovation can affect value/risk). The paper does not single out this source for a distinct theoretical mechanism, hypothesis logic, measurement choice, or methodological borrowing. Because the citation functions as part of a general prior-work list rather than a specific building block, its role is best classified as mention-only.
